##NAMES=Lileyite
##RRUFFID=R140773
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ba_2_Ti_2_Na(NaFe^2+^)Mg(Si_2_O_7_)_2_O_2_F_2_
##LOCALITY=Graulay, Hillesheim, Eifel, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Reddish brown prismatic crystals with fine striations, associated with pyroxene, schorlomite and leucite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140773
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 19.885 b: 7.084 c: 5.396 alpha: 90 beta: 96.47 gamma: 90 volume: 755.2 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
